items.title: "Abandon Politics Of Confusion": BJP Slams Rahul Gandhi's NEET Leak Remark
items.summary: BJP's Sanjay Mayukh accused Rahul Gandhi of spreading confusion by making baseless allegations to exploit the "tragic situation" to serve his own political agenda.
